text: I have had headaches since age 17. The acid reflux isn't as bad as it used to be. For my Blood Pressure its been as high as 199/105 and as low as 120/72. I have a fear of drs and hospitals and white coats. No matter how I try to relax it seems the pressure is always high. I had the other BP meds, Norvasc, Altonel, and used a diuretic to no avail. I am now dealing with high blood pressure and looking down the road at a hip and knee replacement.
